hypothesis: Higher entropy (ent_coef=0.05, 7x increase) to fix policy mode collapse. The survive bracket (exp_034-037) proved reward tuning alone cannot solve hover-or-crash: stochastic policy navigates (28.61 reward) but deterministic mean crashes. ent_coef=0.05 prevents mode collapse by forcing wider policy distribution. At survive=0.5 (stable hover), entropy pushes exploration away from hover. PBRS + speed provide directional reward during exploration. The mean policy stays closer to the successful exploration distribution instead of collapsing to hover. This is a STRATEGY PIVOT from reward tuning to policy optimization.
